description: Accessible, performant interfaces for enterprise workflows and data products.
Reliable service architecture, APIs, integration layers, and domain platforms.
Secure cloud foundations, modernization, and scalable managed services.
LLM applications, assistants, agent workflows, and responsible AI productization.

Pipelines, warehouses, lakehouses, orchestration, lineage, and quality controls.

Executive dashboards, analytical products, and embedded reporting interfaces.
